reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Elite Testosterone Clinic and highly recommend Sarah and her team.
After extensive research, this clinic offered the most competitive pricing for TRT in the Portland area without sacrificing quality. Sarah is highly professional, detail-oriented, and clearly very proficient in her field. She approaches care thoughtfully and with a high level of clinical competence.

This was my first time starting TRT, so I was understandably a bit apprehensive. Sarah took the time to listen carefully, answer all of my questions thoroughly, and explain the process clearly, which made everything feel seamless and reassuring.

Since starting treatment, I’ve experienced significant improvements in energy, mood, and libido. I also came in with other health conditions that were indirectly and partially related to low testosterone, and Sarah worked with me to integrate those considerations into my TRT plan, rather than treating testosterone in isolation. That individualized approach made a meaningful difference.

The office itself has a comfortable, male-friendly environment, which was a refreshing change from more generic medical clinics. In addition to testosterone replacement therapy, Sarah also offers other hormone and peptide therapies, allowing for a more comprehensive and personalized approach to health optimization.

Overall, Elite Testosterone Clinic delivers excellent care, transparency, results, and value. I’m very glad I chose this clinic and would confidently recommend it to anyone considering TRT or related therapies.

reviews.name: places/ChIJt4y_iQXJuFQRcZZEUbU_SBs/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkemNWVlBWVjlTT1d4ZmNWVTJRVEZVYkhkR04yYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Collins has a heart for getting you well. Having had cancer fourteen years ago, I have no thyroid gland. Many doctors have had the “well the numbers look good, you must be feeling well” approach. Dr. Collins understands many reasons why things may not be right even though tests show they should be. He is more interested in you feeling well than the numbers. His approach has revealed things about my present condition I think many doctors missed.

While he had my thyroid hormone condition under control, another issue sprang up that traditional doctors approached with the usual pain medications. My gut was constantly hurting. MRIs and ultra sounds, showed nothing. No one offered any reason for my pain. Dr. Collins correctly identified pain in fatty tissues and an incorrect balance of gut microbes.

More and more information is being found all the time about how important your gut health is to the rest of your body. Dr. Collins takes a great interest in this subject. He is very concerned for the health of the gut in the American diet that has been terribly broken down by pesticides typically sprayed on seed products and the toxic byproducts of seed oils (wheat, corn, rye, barley, rice and so forth).  He has discovered the findings from MIT and a heart surgeon Dr. William Davis who published Super Gut, that showed there is a missing gut biome called L. Reuteri. Without this biome, all the fatty pain tissues and issues inside the gut caused my pain. Dr. Collins graciously offered a free starter of L. Reuteri and the instructions to grow a yogurt from these bacteria. I was on my way to health.

Dr. Collins makes clear that you must have the desire to “follow” the treatment. For this treatment I needed to get off all seed products and take the yogurt daily. This takes some time, several months and at first it was difficult to tell if I was getting better. By the third month there was no doubt. I lost eighteen pounds of fat over my gut and the pain went away. The pain from my sciatica went away due to a reduction in inflammation. This is a side benefit I did not expect. My back hurt less, again, a reduction in inflammation. My skin started looking better.

Soon, my wife started taking it because she had trouble with inflammation in her hands. Indeed, her hands and knuckles started to improve, and also her skin.

Dr. Collins wants everyone to know about this, and so do I. I highly recommend this treatment and other natural approaches that Dr. Collins employs.

I had a terrible fall on the ice here in Bend, OR a few days before. Not only did he address my knee but he addressed my fractured tailbone and all the pain I was having for my fall. No joke, I had a noticeable relief by the time I was leaving his office. I experienced some pain and soreness that night from all of the injections but within two days I was sitting on my tailbone again and walking around without excruciating pain. I’m now committed to going through the process to address pain in my shoulders hip and knees. Can’t wait to keep the healing going! Thank you Dr. Drew!!

reviews.text: Dr. Collins is awesome and helped me when no other doctor could.  I went to see Dr. Collins due to multiple medical problems due to a car accident.  Dr. Collins treated my neck, shoulders, lower back and knees with tremendous success. I had seen many pain management specialists in the past who could only provide temporary pain relief with treatments and medications but Dr. Collins provided me with concrete permanent results. In addition his treatments were pain free! I had very bad knee pain due to degenerative arthritis and all pain is gone now.  I had excruciating pain in my lower back and that is gone now because of Dr. Collins treatments. I had frozen muscles and tendons in my shoulders and neck and he was the only doctor that successfully gave me permanent relief.  In closing, if you are really motivated to get relief from persistent pain go see Dr. Collins and you won't regret it.  He specializes in ozone therapy, hormone replacement, hypothyroidism, prolotherapy, stem cell therapy, anti-aging, nutrition and offers concierge medicine. I am more than grateful that he is conveniently located in Bend so I can see him for all my medical needs in the future.

reviews.text:
I came to Dr. Meaghan Dishman during a season when I knew my body needed deeper support. I wasn’t looking for a quick prescription, I was looking for answers and someone willing to dig beneath the surface. From our first appointment, I felt a difference. Dr. Dishman asks thoughtful questions, explains the “why” behind what’s happening, and approaches health in a way that feels collaborative rather than transactional. She helped me see patterns I hadn’t connected before and how stress, hormones, sleep, and digestion were all influencing each other.
What stands out most is her balance of clinical knowledge and genuine presence. I felt taken seriously. I felt informed. And most importantly, I felt hopeful. If you want a provider who combines root-cause medicine with compassion and clarity, Dr. Dishman is someone you want on your team.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ57OXESzGuFQRqbtMawlnkWg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xWVVqQXlUMHQzWkUxV1JuTkdOVk0yU2pCNFVWRRAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Dishman is the best! I went to Dr. Dishman hoping to find the root cause of unexplained infertility. She listened to everything I had to share with compassion and dove into testing to try and find out what might be going on.
Dr. Dishman then created a plan for me based on my test results, and I ended up conceiving naturally which I did not think was possible. I feel like I have the best support and health advocate in my corner with Dr. Dishman and can't thank her enough for the life-changing work she does!

reviews.text: Dr. Dishman is more than a doctor - she's become a spiritual advisor, mentor, coach and confidante. I have started my sessions on the brink of tears from overwhelm, exhaustion and stress --> and ended my sessions with insights and calm. I am so grateful that I have Dr. Dishman in my life.

reviews.text: The effort from Dr. Dishman and the staff is unmatched. They really care about the patient long term Jacque has gone above and beyond to assist me . My interactions with Dr. Dishman have been life changing . Highly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ57OXESzGuFQRqbtMawlnkWg/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRMlozZlJREAE
reviews.text:
My husband began as a patient of Dr. Dishman's in 2010.  His cholesterol and general health was way out of the normal, healthy range.  He had IBS symptoms and deep vein pain in his legs when walking for any distance.  His seasonal and pet allergies were out of control.  At 36 years of age, he faced the choice of being put on a multitude of drugs from his primary care physician, or, as he described it, taking his body into his own hands and getting down to the business of truly becoming healthy.  After one visit with Dr. Dishman his life was changed.  She prescribed an anti-inflammatory diet and ordered blood tests.  His blood work revealed sensitivities to a multitude of foods.  He cut them out of his diet and began to feel better immediately.  He lost over 20 pounds, his blood lipid panel came back fantastic, and he was no longer even allergic to cats!
Needless to say, I had to see what Dr. Dishman could do for me.  I didn't have as many health complaints, but what I have learned from her has also changed the way that I eat and care for by health.  I feel better at 42 than I did in my 20s!  Finally, my youngest daughter is also a patient of Dr. Dishman's; she is a 10 year old who suffered from high cholesterol and IBS symptoms.  Thanks to Dr. Dishman, after 1 month of treatment, she feels absolutely wonderful!  Our family is now so happy and healthy!

reviews.text: I have been visiting Glow and Dr. Wendy Weintrob for at least 8 years.  Dr. Wendy is truly top notch. She  always provides me with alternatives and detailed information to make informed decisions about my health. She truly wants her patients to live healthy, well balanced lives and while she genuinely wants to work with you make sure you are on that path, she does not "over prescribe" visits or supplements that she deems unnecessary. She will always present pros and cons to help you make choices. What I also love about Dr. Wendy is that she understands both naturopathic and traditional, western medicine have their places and will work in concert with my "regular" doctor to ensure the best possible outcomes.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ71fFPizGuFQRXMDkr6c1W3E/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbG9lb3RRRRAB
reviews.text:
I have been going to Wendy for several years now and I had one of the best acupuncture sessions today.  Halfway through my time on the table, I had a full body surge of xi, energy emanating from my torso and coursing through leg and arm limbs for several minutes.  It was a blissful experience.  Afterwards, I felt wide awake and energized although it was late morning and time for lunch.

I am always grateful to see Wendy because she treats the whole person, not just particular symptoms.  I am feeling better about menopause because she is helping me adjust to the changes and, even, become asymptomatic.  Thanks, Wendy!  I look forward to seeing you every month!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ71fFPizGuFQRXMDkr6c1W3E/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3cGFMTmt3RRAB
reviews.text: For years I’ve not felt well and knew I could feel better. I suffered from a general feeling of being overwhelmed, low to no energy, digestion issues, PMS and was over weight no matter what I did. I found Dr Wendy Weintrob during an Internet  search and after reading what her specialty’s were I made an appointment with hope even though no one has been able to help me in the past. That was 6 months ago. I am a new woman! I am no longer overwhelmed and can actually get my tasks checked off the list. My energy has spiked and I’m down 15-20 lbs. Apparently my gut was a problem and Dr Wendy Weintrob zeroed in on the problem and put me on a regimen of herbs and vitamins. My digestion has improved to the point that I virtually have no gas. No belching or any other gas problems or pains. As far as PMS and 9-12 day cycles, no more, PMS has greatly improved and I have 25-26 day cycles again. Dr Weintrob knew I could feel better and she lead the way to my new and improved life!!! Thank you Dr Weintrob, you saved me from a miserable life!

She and her staff offer a healing and accepting environment which my son looks forward to going back! Thank you Dr Wendy for all you do!

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend this clinic highly enough — they have genuinely given me myself back.

Navigating perimenopause felt overwhelming and isolating at first. I didn't feel like me anymore — my moods were unpredictable, my hormones felt completely out of balance, and I was struggling to find clarity in my own mind. From my very first appointment, I was met with such care and intention. There was no generic protocol handed to me — the team took the time to truly understand my body, my lifestyle, and my goals, and built a personalized plan that felt like it was made just for me.

The difference has been remarkable. My hormone symptoms are so much more manageable, my mood has stabilized in ways I didn't think were possible, and I finally feel mentally clear and grounded again. This clinic has a rare gift for making you feel both seen and supported, and their knowledge is matched only by their genuine warmth.

If you are navigating perimenopause or any hormonal journey and wondering if there is a more natural path forward — please make an appointment. I am so grateful I did.

reviews.text: I truly cannot speak highly enough of Dr. Ariel Weiner. For years, I searched for someone who not only understood hormonal imbalance at a clinical level but also took the time to listen and treat the whole person. I have found no one else like her. reviews.name: places/ChIJ2fLNDyzGuFQRT_PaVXmO7wE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkQ05YVnpVWGhFVTFkM09UUjZTakpXVlVoYVkxRRAB
reviews.text: Inspired Health has been a true  life-changer for me! After years of unexplained infertility, I was able to conceive naturally under the care plan developed specifically for me by Dr. Dishman. The whole team is warm, friendly, responsive and wonderful. I can't recommend them enough if you feel like your health journey is coming up without answers. Dr. Dishman has helped me in ways I didn't think were possible and done so in the most kind and supportive way!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2fLNDyzGuFQRT_PaVXmO7wE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkcmJqUnJhV1JITFhodFgzRkJOR1IzYWtwaFpsRRAB
reviews.text:
There was a point where I knew I couldn’t keep pushing through fatigue, stress, and “normal” symptoms that didn’t feel normal in my body. On the outside I was functioning, but internally I knew something was off. Choosing to work with Inspired Health shifted everything for me. Instead of masking symptoms, we explored root causes. Instead of feeling rushed or dismissed, I felt seen, heard, and supported in my full story. What’s been most profound isn’t just symptom improvement, it’s understanding how interconnected everything is: hormones, stress, gut health, sleep, nervous system. Healing wasn’t about a quick fix; it was about building a foundation.
The biggest shift has been learning to reconnect to my body and trust what it’s telling me. If you feel like something is off but can’t quite explain it, trust that! There are practitioners who will listen and help you uncover the root. That kind of care is truly life-changing.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2fLNDyzGuFQRT_PaVXmO7wE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWck5qVmplWE5NTTFwSlNqZHJaMEpvUkZGalRFRRAB
reviews.text:
I cannot speak highly enough of Dr. Ari Weiner. She has been an incredible partner in navigating perimenopause and improving my overall health. Working with her, I feel truly heard, understood, and supported.

Dr. Weiner takes a thoughtful, holistic, and science-based approach to care. She doesn’t rush appointments, she asks smart questions, and she explains things in a way that makes you feel informed and empowered. Every recommendation she has made has been tailored to my unique symptoms and goals.
Her expertise in women’s hormones is exceptional, but equally important is her genuine compassion. She creates a safe, collaborative environment where you feel like a whole person, not just a list of symptoms.

Inspired Health as a whole is warm, organized, and professional, and working with Dr. Weiner has been one of the best decisions I’ve made for my health. I’m extremely grateful for her care and would recommend her wholeheartedly to anyone seeking support with perimenopause or broader wellness concerns.

reviews.name: places/ChIJF9OQPFnHuFQRjIjkNbt55x0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tkSWRWcDNTek54WmtWMlZGcHlhWGhqZURCWFZFRRAB
reviews.text:
Tried going with OMC Bend after seeing Free T screening before 10am. After Emailing with OMC about out of pocket monthly costs. I decided the $250-$300 monthly price range was acceptable. Went in on a Monday at 930am. Was turned away for not being early enough. No problem. Came back the next day and had a blood draw. Was told they would call me with the results on Thursday. Finally on Monday I decided I would contact them to see if they had the results. They did so I setup a consultation meeting the next day. When I arrived and said I would be paying out of pocket. She said didn't matter what was prices were discussed in an email. The cost for another blood draw and consultation was $580 plus. I asked can we just have a consultation based on the blood draw I already had. Nope need to have another one done. I pulled out $530 cash. She said sorry not enough and we only take card.

So in summary. The free T screening means absolutely nothing. It's not walk ins before 10am. The info they get from the free blood draw means nothing. They don't accept cash. If you are like me and are contemplating going with an at home online TRT program. Do it do not go with OMC.

reviews.text: I have followed Alyssa as a patient for YEARS and am so happy she has started her own practice! She is an expert in all things aging, as well as in dermatology. I originally saw her for dermatology many years ago and was impressed then. Since that time, I have seen Alyssa for menopause-related symptoms. She helped me to understand that I did not have to live in misery the way I had been. I will never forget when she said, "You don't have to live like this." Since that conversation, I have been seeing her for bio-identical hormone pellets for years now, as well as for hair loss. She is communicative, thorough, kind, accurate, precise, and extremely knowledgeable and intelligent. I truly do not know what I would do without Alyssa's expertise and treatment. I would follow her to the ends of the earth!

reviews.name: places/ChIJiZMfIaIdaqcRUh4Wcu6iGYE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGM1VFVnBTMU4xYWxKMU5HRjViRTFxVjBKWldGRRAB
reviews.text:
I am a happy man! I turned 50 this past year and was feeling the gradual decline of my wellbeing. Although my primary doctor said my blood work was “normal,” I met with Alyssa Abbey for a second opinion and to explore optimizing my testosterone levels.
After reviewing my labs, Alyssa laid out several options and I began testosterone replacement therapy. Originally I was administering shots to myself twice weekly, but then switched to pellet insertion for simplicity. Since starting treatment, I’ve returned to my high school weight and seen major improvements in my energy, athletic stamina, mental clarity, and sexual performance. What I once accepted as normal aging turned out to have a simple solution.
I highly recommend seeing Alyssa to discover what you’re still capable of.

Being in our 50s, we know this is going to improve our lives in so many ways, and we’re grateful to have Alyssa guiding us on this journey.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOcoHSxfHuFQRac9e3ObJLfo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CUWFGQnRaRXh1WTFGRWVHVnlRMjFGVjFCMWQwRRAB
reviews.text:
I went to Jennifer Nelson at SHIFT with a long list of underlying health concerns that no other care team had been able to properly address for over two years. I was struggling with chronic sleep issues that affected nearly every aspect of my health — including gut health, persistent headaches, the list went on.

Jennifer has been incredibly supportive and thorough in helping me carve out a path forward with HRT treatment. For the first time in years, I’m finally able to sleep — and the improvement in my overall well-being has been life-changing.

I truly can’t speak highly enough of her ability to look beyond surface-level symptoms and focus on identifying and addressing the root cause, rather than offering a temporary fix. If you’re looking for a provider who is knowledgeable about HRT, collaborative with other healthcare teams, and genuinely invested in your long-term health, I highly recommend Jennifer and SHIFT.

The entire team is fantastic, with special thanks to Amy for her exceptional attention to detail and follow-up.
I highly recommend this practice to anyone seeking truly personalized, patient-centered care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOcoHSxfHuFQRac9e3ObJLfo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT204NFNrbEtNbFZIUXprMGJWcE5PVXR4VlhvMFIzYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Dr. Lyndsey for acupuncture for several months and she is an incredible practitioner. She radiates warmth, kindness, and intelligence. She listens carefully to symptoms and helps weave together a cohesive understanding of the body through the lens of Chinese Medicine. I look forward to my sessions with her so much and have seen many positive improvements in my menstrual cycle health, hormones, and nervous system regulation. Lyndsey truly feels like a partner on my healing journey. She understands the body’s innate wisdom and how to create the ideal conditions for healing. I highly recommend her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJOcoHSxfHuFQRac9e3ObJLfo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWdVVGTlhOV0pqVW5WRVpWVk9hSEZoTFdoZmJWRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ve been working with Dr. Marie Agnew for about five years now, and she’s truly changed my life. When I first came to her, I had been dismissed by countless doctors who couldn’t explain my gut issues, constant fatigue, frequent illnesses, and unexplained infertility. My immune system was struggling, and I was sick all the time. I had already gone through extensive testing with my gynecologist and still had no answers.

Traditional medicine only offered quick fixes and prescriptions. Dr. Agnew, through her functional medicine approach, took the time to truly listen, believe me, and dig deeper. She immediately sensed something more was going on and didn’t stop until we found the root causes.

We started by working on my gut health and hormones, uncovering food intolerances and allergies that had been missed for years. Once we made progress there, we went further — testing for mold, heavy metals, and environmental toxins that turned out to be way off the charts. From there, Marie helped me create a customized protocol that fit my time, energy, and budget. She’s incredibly mindful of being upfront about testing costs and works with you to find what’s realistic and effective, which I deeply appreciate since many functional medicine tests aren’t covered by insurance.

Marie has supported me through every step of this journey, even sharing tears during my infertility struggles. She doesn’t just mask symptoms with pharmaceuticals — she offers holistic solutions, targeted supplements, and practical lifestyle changes that actually work.

If you’re searching for a compassionate, thorough, and deeply knowledgeable functional medicine doctor in Bend, Oregon, I can’t recommend Dr. Marie Agnew enough. She’s helped me find answers, balance, and healing I never thought possible. Truly life-changing care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJOcoHSxfHuFQRac9e3ObJLfo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0U1kwazBNbWRMV1VwT2FWWTFka0Y1VVhveGRVRRAB
reviews.text: Working with Shift, Dr Agnew and the support staff has been a real journey to creating my own personalized health and wellness routine.  I really enjoyed and felt supported by the entire team as we worked to help my autoimmune, environmental allergies and stress levels.  The food content was especially interesting.  It was not easy at times to work through food elimination but I now have a better understanding of how to nourish myself and the impact that foods have on my whole system.  I couldn’t recommend Shift Functional Medicine enough.  If you are thinking about making a change in your health care I encourage you to reach out to Shift.  They are really great!

reviews.text:
I have much more experience at Hale Clinic than any of the other reviewers.  I also have a great deal of experience with traveling overseas and self injecting testosterone, for 6 years.  During the past 6 years, there were zero issues.   Recently on a trip, Hale Clinic did not give me the correct dose of testosterone, and I complained about that.  Here is the response of Dr. Ferry's wife:

Angela Ferry writing:
I’m here with Dr. Ferry, he would like you to find a new clinic. We have a zero tolerance for bullies and passive-aggressive behavior. Please let us know to whom to transfer your medical records to. Please. I will refund your last payment to Hale.

Now me talking:
My father, brother, and I have been patients of Hale Clinic for 6 years.  I travel abroad for 3 months a year.  On my last trip, Dr. Ferry gave me only 3 ml of cypionate per week.  I have been taking 8 ml per week for the past 6 years.

When I complained about the inadequate doses, Dr. Ferry said:
1) I am a Bully.
2) I am Passive Aggressive.
3) I will no longer be treated by Dr. Ferry EVER.

Ferry permanently booted me from the Hale program due to HIS OWN MISTAKE.  Let that sink in for a minute.   Dr. Ferry kicked me out of the program because he underserved me my correct dose of testosterone, after six years of loyal service.

In my opinion, Dr. Ferry is a petty vindictive man more concerned with his own pride than the well being of his patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9yWR43QdwVQRM-TfnKsBuW4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSdVVraDVTMnQxTFhweWFHMVFiR0ZtVUhaSVoxRRAB
reviews.text: I found Chris through a co worker and all I can say is that I am so glad I reached out to Chris! TRT has changed my life. I was feeling tired all the time and just not feeling great in general. My Primary provider said my testosterone level was "normal" for my age. I was hesitant to start TRT because I wasn't having any of the stereotypical issues like ED that tend to lead men to this type of treatment. After talking to Chris about all the other things that "healthy" Testosterone levels can help with I decided to give this a try and I am so glad that I did. I have more energy throughout the day, I have better mental focus and feel better overall. If you're tired of feeling "normal" for your age, I highly recommend looking into TRT. It really is so much more than a treatment for ED. I have the energy and desire to work out again, and most of the aches and pains that I had in my knees and other joints has all but disappeared. Thank you Chris for explaining all the other benefits of TRT that are not typically advertised or talked about outside of ED!!

reviews.text:
Dr. Brown is amazing! I have been working with him for almost two years, and I highly recommend his services. My treatment was specifically for weight loss, but he also offers hormone replacement therapy (HRT) for both men and women. He is intelligent yet down-to-earth, explaining things in a way that I can easily understand. He takes the time to thoroughly answer all of my questions.

Dr. Brown is incredibly kind, non-judgmental, and shows a lot of compassion. He customized my weight loss treatment plan and made me feel like he saw me as a person rather than just a source of income. I used assisted medication for weight loss, but Dr. Brown also provided assistance with workouts and dietary advice. His approach is well-rounded and focused on making lasting lifestyle changes. I recommended Dr. Brown to three of my friends, and they are now patients.

Attached are before and after pictures of my weight loss journey.  Very grateful to have found Dr. Brown!

reviews.name: places/ChIJySxNYhmZlVQRN8ekz7DlIZQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OTVZuQlJiV1oxVlc1SmEyMXphMVZFYVRsUFIyYxAB
reviews.text:
Dr. Brown is honestly the best medical provider I’ve ever seen. He actually listens. He’s attentive. He makes time. He asks questions and is fully present the entire time. He doesn't just rattle off information or rush through the appointment like so many others do.

Unlike a lot of these online HRT providers, Dr. Brown genuinely cares. He’s thoughtful, engaged, and clearly invested in his patients. I don’t get passed off to a nurse or squeezed in for a five-minute check-in. When I go in, he’s the one I meet with. He takes the time and gives his full attention.

It’s probably the best healthcare experience I’ve ever had. Definitely one of the best. I researched nine different clinics before choosing him, and I’m really glad I didn’t go with the cheapest option. He’s only slightly more than his competitors, but the level of care he provides is worth every bit of it.

If you’re considering HRT, book a phone consultation. That one conversation will show you exactly what I mean. I’m not going to keep quiet about something this good. People deserve to know that there are still providers out there who care.

His office is almost 25 miles from where I live, and I truly hate driving in traffic. But I still make that drive regularly because it’s worth it to have that kind of one-on-one care. This isn’t a rushed, transactional appointment. It’s a real experience where you feel heard and supported.

Thanks Dr. Brown for being you and for changing the game in healthcare. The world needs more people like you in it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJzfJjeWz_v1QRRJ6-obd8pS4/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNULWFHMm5BRRAB
reviews.text:
5 stars for Katherine Zuber. 2 stars for the clinic themselves. Zuber is a fantastic endocrinologist and provides a safe space for trans and queer folks. She’s Covid cautious and a really wonderful doctor.

My review is so low because the clinic does not require anybody to be wearing face masks. I am immunocompromised and so are most people who are patients with this clinic. I have talked to the manager of the clinic and was told to my face that she doesn’t care about the lives of disabled people even tho she runs a clinic that is life saving for them.

I cannot leave my house or go places without risking my health 5 years into this pandemic due to the gross lack of care from the government and also people abandoning the chronically ill and disabled community due to their own desire to “go back to normal”. There’s no going back to normal for disabled people and at the bare minimum I should be safe where doctors are providing services but that is not the case with this clinic.

They do not provide staff with anything other than surgical masks when the current recommendation is a high quality well fitted respirator like a N95 or a 3M Aura. I have to ask every time for my nurse to be wearing a high quality respirator and this time she had to borrow one from my doctor who buys them her self and are not provided for her by the clinic.

It’s so extremely painful and isolating to not have the bare minimum of care provided to me at a place that claims to help disabled people. Doctors and clinics that do not continue to wear face masks are ableist and are participating in a mass normalization of killing disabled people.

Covid doesn’t just affect disabled people it will disable any healthy person including children. It destroys your immune system with every infection and you become more susceptible to opportunistic diseases just like HIV. this is quite literally airborne HIV as it stays in your body forever.

Long Covid can also cause a range of physical diseases like type 1 diabetes, the condition I have that requires me to have to see an endocrinologist in the first place. Every secretary, nurse, and doctor in this clinic should be wearing high quality respirators the entire time to midigate the spread of this DEADLY airborne virus.

reviews.text:
I was referred to Dr. Pendell by a friend after seeing several other doctors with little to no results, and it turned out to be one of the best decisions I’ve ever made. Dr. Pendell has truly changed my life and given me back my health.

Since starting treatment in May, I’ve lost 25 pounds, gained noticeable muscle mass, and—most importantly—my daily pain level has gone from something I constantly lived with to nearly zero. I used to walk around in discomfort every day, and now I feel like a completely different person.

Dr. Pendell took the time to really listen, understand what was going on, and design a plan tailored specifically for me. His expertise, professionalism, and genuine care for his patients are unmatched.

If you’re struggling with your health, feeling unheard, or just not getting results elsewhere, I highly recommend Dr. Pendell and Wildwood Men’s Clinic.

reviews.text: I cannot recommend Stacy enough. As a post-partum mom and peri menopausal woman with PCOS, Stacy’s care has restored much needed peace and stability in my life. The functional medicine “root cause” and “whole picture” approach is executed thoughtfully and completely by Stacy. I feel that every part of me is being cared for: metabolically, mentally, physically, hormonally, nutritionally. I understand my lab work and appreciate her thorough follow-up care. I have had untreated PCOS for many years and Stacy is the first one to truly tackle it. I look forward to continued care and progress with her. You are in good hands.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ-zKcxB1lVQR8RE6L2-OlWI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwUlQyWjNWM1Z3T1VsQ1ZUTnFNV1JzT1RsTWFXYxAB
reviews.text:
I was referred to Stacy Marie by a friend and what I am impressed with is her level of care, open communication, her ability to listen and share information in a concise but easy to understand way. She makes it a point to thoroughly review all of my current and past lab results, along with my medical history. In fact, after our initial appointment I felt that she knew more about me and my medical needs more than my primary care physician.

She looks at the whole picture, reviewing past tests and listens to my concerns to create a plan that is tailored just for me.  My primary concerns were to focus on post-menopause symptoms but after speaking with her I gained insight on other items to prioritize.

I am only a week in under her care and look forward to Stacy’s holistic approach in regaining back my health and confidence!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ-zKcxB1lVQR8RE6L2-OlWI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oSlJVeEllbUpaZEV4NmFscEdNM0J6VWtwd1dYYxAB
reviews.text:
As the owner of a pediatric functional medicine clinic, I’ve referred countless moms to Stacy Marie, NP—many of whom had been stuck for years, if not decades, without answers or progress. Time and again, Stacy’s collaborative and supportive approach has given them breakthroughs that finally move the needle on their health.

What sets her apart is not just her expertise, but the way she teaches. Through her educational program, Stacy equips providers with practical tools and clear frameworks to help women who might otherwise feel “unfixable.” She makes complex concepts accessible and gives providers confidence to step into these hard cases.

I’ve seen firsthand the difference her work makes: healthier moms, healthier kids, and healthier families. For providers looking to invest in education that will transform how you care for women, Stacy’s program is a resource I wholeheartedly recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ-zKcxB1lVQR8RE6L2-OlWI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGdmEwcDBZMkZRZFVsWGVtUm1iM2s0UXpKSGRVRRAB
reviews.text: I've been seeing Stacy for a little over a year, and I can say I've never felt better!  I feel so much more in control of my health as well.  I've recommended her to many friends and will continue to do so!

reviews.name: places/ChIJJ-zKcxB1lVQR8RE6L2-OlWI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GVWVsSjVZbWhGVlVwc2QybENXVXhSTUhaelVsRRAB
reviews.text: Wow...what a paradigm shift in healthcare! This is the experience I thought healthcare should be, but it seemed like some far-off fantasy land! I'm kind of pinching myself to make sure it's real. I'm blown away by the personal attention that is tailored to my specific background and needs that covers my entire life history. I'm excited to get to the root of health problems and mysteries rather than just making-do, or masking the symptoms with drugs, but never addressing the real problem. The access to shoot off a quick text (and actually get a timely and helpful reply!) is amazing. Stacy and team are simply the best healthcare experience you could ask for. Working with Stacy and team is worth every penny. I'm excited for my new health journey ahead!

reviews.text: I was told to arrive at 10:45 for my 11am appointment. I did and at 11am, I was taken to a room where my blood pressure, etc. Were taken. She didn't know anything and seemed very unconcerned that I had waited 30 minutes (must be normal). A few minutes later she came back to tell me that my doctor was with another patient and she was guessing another 10 minutes. Please tell me why I signed an agreement to be charged $75 if I miss my appointment, but the doctor can show up 45 minutes (or more, I left so I honestly don't know when she ever showed up) late. This doctor has no respect for her patients' time. No one bothered to communicate if they were running late or anything. They just left me in there.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVXlR6z_v1QRAMzenM33NLU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GRlYzSkhPWGRmUlVwNmJrUTRiREpDWVhnMWVFRRAB
reviews.text:
I absolutely love Resilient Human Performance. I’ve always struggled to stay consistent with workouts and find a gym where I felt comfortable and actually made progress. After trying different training styles, I found RHP last year through a friend’s recommendation—and it’s been exactly what I was looking for.
The trainers take time to understand your goals and create personalized 4-week programs tailored to help you achieve them. Having coaches on the floor at all times to help with form, injury prevention, and questions makes a huge difference.
The trainers are incredibly supportive and knowledgeable, and the environment is welcoming and motivating. Working out has become one of my favorite parts of the week—and I even convinced my wife to join. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVXlR6z_v1QRAMzenM33NLU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sd1ExWktTWFJWYVRnemFFazBWemxWVlRORFEyYxAB
reviews.text:
My son started training at Resilient Human Performance to improve his overall athleticism, hoping it would carry over to baseball and the results have been incredible. I’ve watched him make significant physical improvements, and even noticed a clear difference in his swing.

While those gains have been fantastic, the absolute best part has been seeing his confidence grow. He truly enjoys his workouts and looks forward to every session. Aaron, Uno, Jesus, and Nathan have created such a welcoming, positive, and fun environment that he’s always excited when it’s time to train.

I can honestly say our experience at Resilient Human Performance has been transformative, and I'm so grateful for the impact they’ve had on my son both on and off the field.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVXlR6z_v1QRAMzenM33NLU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xrMFowcDZhRmxxY1hocmRWcHVNamxXYTFadGNWRRAB
reviews.text: My 12 year old son has made big strides in all around strength and athleticism in three months leading up to baseball season.  Aaron and the other trainers have been very engaging with him and the other youth resulting in increased mental toughness.  Highly recommended for anyone wanting to get their middle schooler into a strength and fitness program to set the foundation for future growth and commitment.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVXlR6z_v1QRAMzenM33NLU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21Fd1gzcFlZbmd5ZWpGVmVtUkRkWGRpU1c5RmRuYxAB
reviews.text:
Since starting a three-day-a-week exercise routine at Resilient Human Performance (RHP) a little over a year ago, I’ve seen a significant improvement in both my flexibility and strength. At 77 years old, the personalized attention and thoughtful programming have made all the difference—not just for me, but for everyone training alongside me.

The team does an excellent job of creating structured, safe, and motivating workouts that truly help you transition from feeling sluggish to feeling active and capable. I especially appreciate the encouragement, incentives, and the genuine care they show for each individual’s progress.

Aaron, Jesus, Nathan, and Uno bring humor, camaraderie, and positive energy to every session, making it a place you actually look forward to going. RHP has been a game-changer for my health and well-being, and I couldn’t recommend it more highly.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVXlR6z_v1QRAMzenM33NLU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sMlFtWllVVnA0ZVcxNmRFSndNRmRpY3pGcVdYYxAB
reviews.text:
Resilient Human Performance is hands down one of the best training environments around. Their approach to personal training is intentional, individualized, and rooted in long-term results, not quick fixes. They truly meet you where you are, whether you’re just starting your fitness journey or looking to take your performance to the next level.

What sets them apart is their ability to train everyone. From adults focused on strength, mobility, and overall health to youth athletes developing speed, power, and confidence their coaching is professional, positive, and extremely knowledgeable. They emphasize proper movement, injury prevention, and building a strong foundation that translates into real performance gains.

Their work with youth athletes is especially impressive. They create a structured, encouraging environment that helps young athletes grow not just physically, but mentally. Confidence, discipline, and work ethic are clearly part of the culture.

If you’re looking for a facility that combines expertise, accountability, and a supportive community — Resilient Human Performance delivers. Highly recommend!

reviews.text: Oregon Man’s Clinic in Bend is top-notch. From the moment you walk in, the staff is welcoming, professional, and genuinely cares about your health and goals. The clinic is clean, comfortable, and well run, and the team takes the time to explain everything clearly without rushing you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJV0BBvSnhwFQRAktf8axA0WI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Oc09EVnFOelZDTjFkVVIwVmhjM0p5VVVoaVUwRRAB
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience at Oregon Man Clinic. The entire staff was professional, welcoming, and attentive. Soon after my visit, Russ personally reviewed my lab results with me, explaining everything clearly and thoroughly so I could understand my body’s needs and the steps we could take to improve my overall health. I truly appreciate how informative and supportive the process was, and I feel confident moving forward with their guidance.

reviews.name: places/ChIJV0BBvSnhwFQRAktf8axA0WI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sMlMzWjRUWGhYTVhKdGJFWlZUVUZLU0ZKNVdsRRAB
reviews.text: OMC is interested in a not so novel approach to medicine. I believe, after about a year of frequenting their clinic, that they are most interested in the whole patient. While they do dispense meds, that is not the main focus. The main focus is for you to be your most healthy self. And possibly even eliminating medications that are no longer pertinent. That is a positive shift away from what seems to be the accepted direction forced on primary care providers in modern medical practice.

reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I had a great experience at Gameday Men’s Health during my free consultation. From the moment I walked in, Wendy was welcoming, professional, and genuinely focused on my health. The process was quick and efficient—they ran a full blood panel and checked my testosterone levels right there on-site, with results ready in just 20 minutes.

The provider took the time to explain everything in a way that made sense, answered all my questions without rushing me, and made me feel comfortable throughout the whole appointment. Whether you’re just curious about where your health stands or looking for ongoing support, I’d definitely recommend checking them out.

A+ service, clean and modern facility, and a team that actually cares.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ--UBOcRzlVQRYbM_pYUP6Pw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paT1MyWlNNSGxoTkhKbmVHcE9TM3BwV0ZSME9IYxAB
reviews.text: I am a tough sell of many products, I ask a lot of questions and I get to the bottom of any situation to obtain the information I am seeking. Gameday Men's Health was professional, friendly, courteous and supportive EVEN when they learned I wasn't going to purchase their product. This is the mark of a great customer service oriented company who not only serves you when it benefits them financially. This isn't dumb - this is wisdom at it's best and certainly the mark of a company that gets customer service. Who do you think I would trust and return to if I ever wanted a service Gameday provided? Think about that! I can highly recommend this company. BONUS TIP: They provided a free blood test and valuable feedback notwithstanding their other services as part of their overall value. I also witnessed several returning and current clients and heard and felt their happy successes and that - speaks volumes about who they are as a company when they seek a win-win situation, not just benefiting on their side. I think you'd do well to bring your business to Gameday men's Health of Tualatin, Oregon. I will!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ--UBOcRzlVQRYbM_pYUP6Pw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ack4xQlNlV2R6WjFGUVRtcG5kWFZ5V2t4S1JFRRAB
reviews.text: Gameday Men’s Health was awesome. Super friendly staff, very professional, and incredibly efficient. Everything was explained clearly and the whole visit was quick and comfortable. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a smooth, no-stress TRT experience.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ--UBOcRzlVQRYbM_pYUP6Pw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sUE9ETnJSeTF6YzJ4dVRGODFhMTlhWXkxa1FYYxAB
reviews.text: This place is rad. Everyone is super nice. My Doctor, Jeff, is super personable, very knowledgeable, and does what he can to not only continuously educate a dummy like me, but do anything he can to continue to help me reach my goals. This experience is life changing. Thank you Game Day!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ--UBOcRzlVQRYbM_pYUP6Pw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OT1ZERktVVzVtUTFwSFIzSnNRM2s1VVd0MGFYYxAB
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Game Days Men’s Health Clinic. From the moment I walked in, the staff was friendly, professional, and made me feel completely comfortable. They got me in for fast, same-day blood work, and the whole process was smooth and efficient.

After meeting with their team, I was prescribed enclomiphene—and the results have been life-changing. I feel amazing, full of energy, and truly like myself again. The care and attention I received here turned my life around, and I couldn’t be more grateful.

If you’re on the fence about getting checked out, don’t wait—these guys are the real deal. Highly recommend!
